text.title: AI Slop Detector Checklist Procedure
text.summary: Step-by-step procedure to apply AI Slop Detector Checklist end-to-end. Each step names its input, action, output, and (where relevant) a decision-gate.

step.name: count-tics
step.action: grep for forbidden hedging phrases; count.

step.name: check-grounding
step.action: Find every numeric claim, named tool, attributed quote; verify link or strike.
step.decision-gate: If any unsourced number remains, hard-fail.

step.name: verdict
step.action: Compute total; verdict = ship iff total ≥ 80.
